skipped_layers.reason: Spec defines this eval as a reproducible repository contract-smoke record; shell contract tests and fixed pressure-scenario judgments are the required harness boundary.
No external model transcripts were generated; checked-in markdown artifact is the review surface.

runs.summary: Existing v4 routing contract passed before scope-split contract work.
New scope-split contract test passed after semantic contract and skill guidance updates.
Existing v4 routing contract remained green.
Default test runner can invoke the new focused fast test.

with_skill.summary: Scope-split contract test, existing routing regression, and runner invocation passed.

without_skill.summary: Baseline routing contract passed but did not cover semantic contract files or scope-split follow-up semantics.

delta.summary: Active guidance now enforces description-only scope-split follow-ups and blocks planning/execution until future spec review.

run_summary.conclusion: Superpowers scope-split follow-up semantic contract is documented, registered, and covered by focused tests.
